name: lynca-listing-copilot
description: Metaverse Listing Copilot internal title generation webtool.

scripts.check:commercial-review: node --check lib/listing/recognition/commercial-review-packet.mjs && node --check lib/listing/recognition/commercial-review-worklist.mjs && node --check scripts/build-commercial-review-packet.mjs && node --check scripts/build-commercial-review-worklist.mjs && node --check scripts/import-commercial-review-labels.mjs && node --check scripts/commercial-review-packet.test.mjs && node --check scripts/commercial-review-worklist.test.mjs
